TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Stephen_Bardo, title = Stephen_Bardo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stephen_Bardo} }

S.FORM: Stephen Bardo sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 4, Stephen Bardo, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Stephen Bardo sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 4, Stephen Bardo, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~ɕtepħen βar*o s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, s~ɕtepħen βar*o, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
